description: The `EyeControl` DSC resource is used to enable or disable the Windows Eye Control accessibility feature.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `EyeControl` DSC resource is used to enable or disable the Windows Eye Control accessibility feature.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether Eye Control should be enabled (`Present`) or disabled (`Absent`).
        This is a key property.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Setting.Accessibility/EyeControl
